title: Security review: EDHOC RNG no_std + determinism
description: EDHOC uses OsRng (std-only); MockRng deterministic xorshift not integrated. Violates no_std and crypto freshness for tests. RFC 9528 compliance risk on ephemeral keys.
notes: Cherry-picked EDHOC RNG no_std CryptoRng fix from worker9-batch commit 3c1ce642d. Cargo.toml + edhoc.rs updated cleanly. 3 codereview passes passed (no P0-P2). Merge hash integrated; related to project-LICHEN-wwa4.3.
close_reason: Refactored Edhoc*::new to take &mut impl RngCore+CryptoRng; added TestRng with xorshift in tests; removed getrandom from Cargo.toml; no_std compatible, no dead code, tests+clippy pass
